---
title: "admixture"
author: "Andrea Estandia"
date: "01/04/2026"
output: html_document
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r setup}
# Knitr settings: 
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = rprojroot::find_rstudio_root_file())
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, eval = FALSE)
options(scipen = 999)
```

```{r}
source("./src/wm-europe_source.R")
```

```{r define-paths}
# Define color palette for consistency
admix_colors <- c("#67a0bf", "#d6b951", "#d4795b", 
                  "#6da567", "#e38f5e", "#b27fb8", 
                  "#a68d60", "#8e3b3b", "#776da4", 
                  "#123456", "#111111")
```

```{r load-data}
# Load distance data
metadata <-  read.csv(
  file.path(data_path, "dfs_processed", "wgs_europe_metadata.csv"),
  header = TRUE
) %>%
 rename(IID=sample_name) %>%
 select(IID, pop, region, country, sex, latitude, longitude) %>%
 distinct(IID, .keep_all = TRUE)

# Load sample IDs and join with distance data
ids_admix <- read.table(file.path(reports_path, "admixture", 
                            "wm_europe_biallelic_filtered_id_phased.fam"), 
                        header = FALSE) %>% 
  select(V2) %>% 
  rename(IID = V2) %>% 
  left_join(metadata, by = "IID") 
```

```{r}
# build one ADMIXTURE plot for a given K
make_admixture_plot <- function(k, ids_admix, reports_path, figures_path) {
  q_file <- file.path(
    reports_path, "admixture",
    paste0("wm_europe_biallelic_filtered_id_phased.", k, ".Q")
  )

  q <- read.table(q_file, header = FALSE)

  # Combine admixture results with sample information
  admix <- cbind(ids_admix, q)

  # Sort individuals by latitude (north to south)
  admix <- admix %>%
    arrange(desc(latitude)) %>%
    mutate(
      x_pos = row_number(),
      IID = factor(IID, levels = IID)
    )

  # Reshape admixture proportions to long format
  admix_long <- admix %>%
    pivot_longer(
      cols = starts_with("V"),
      names_to = "Kcomp",
      values_to = "proportion"
    )

  # Find one representative (most centered) IID for each region
  region_centers <- admix %>%
    group_by(region) %>%
    summarise(
      center_pos = round(mean(x_pos)),
      .groups = "drop"
    )

  center_labels <- admix %>%
    select(IID, region, x_pos) %>%
    left_join(region_centers, by = "region") %>%
    group_by(region) %>%
    slice_min(order_by = abs(x_pos - center_pos), n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
    ungroup()

  # Build label vector: blank everywhere except the centered sample of each region
  label_vec <- setNames(rep("", nrow(admix)), as.character(admix$IID))
  label_vec[as.character(center_labels$IID)] <- as.character(center_labels$region)

  # Create admixture plot
  p <- ggplot(admix_long, aes(x = IID, y = proportion, fill = Kcomp)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "stack", width = 1) +
    theme_minimal(base_family = "roboto") +
    theme(
      panel.grid = element_blank(),
      panel.background = element_blank(),
      legend.title = element_blank(),
      legend.position = "none",
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
      axis.title.x = element_blank(),
      axis.title.y = element_blank(),
      axis.text.y = element_blank(),
      text = element_text(family = "roboto_condensed", size = 16)
    ) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = rep(admix_colors, length.out = length(unique(admix_long$Kcomp))))+
    scale_x_discrete(labels = label_vec) +
    labs(title = paste0("K = ", k))

  return(p)
}

# Build plots for K = 1..10
plots <- lapply(c(1:10), function(k) {
  make_admixture_plot(k, ids_admix, reports_path, figures_path)
})

# Patchwork into two columns
combined_plot <- wrap_plots(plots, ncol = 1)

# Save combined figure
ggsave(
  filename = file.path(figures_path, "admixture_k1_to_k10.png"),
  plot = combined_plot,
  width = 10,
  height = 16,
  dpi = 300
)
```
